Terms.lead: Please read the terms of use of the UzGovInfo website carefully.

one.title: General provisions
one.text: UzGovInfo is an informational directory of links to official websites of government bodies of the Republic of Uzbekistan. By using this website, you agree to the terms of use set out on this page.

two.title: Informational nature of the website
two.text: UzGovInfo is not an official government portal. It is an independent directory of links to official online resources of government organizations.

three.title: Accuracy of information
three.text: We strive to keep the directory up to date and regularly review links and descriptions. However, the website administration does not guarantee absolute accuracy or timeliness of all published information.

four.title: External links
four.text: The website contains links to external online resources. We do not control the content of these websites and are not responsible for information published on third-party resources.

five.title: Changes to the terms
five.text: The website administration may update or change these terms of use without prior notice. The current version is always available on this page.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.lead: This page explains what data may be processed when you use the website and how we treat it.

one.title: 1. General
one.text: The website is a directory of links to official web resources. We do not require registration and do not ask users to provide personal data to browse pages.

items.one: Technical data: IP address, device/browser type, language, date and time of visit.
items.two: Usage data: pages viewed and actions (in aggregated form).
items.three: Cookies: for traffic analysis and improving website performance.

three.title: 3. Use of Google Analytics
three.text: The website may use Google Analytics web analytics services to analyze traffic. Google Analytics uses cookies to help understand how users interact with the website. The collected information is used only in aggregated form to improve website performance.

four.title: 4. Use of Google AdSense
four.text: The website may use Google AdSense advertising services. Google AdSense uses cookies and other technologies to display ads to users. Third-party vendors, including Google, may use cookies to serve ads based on a user's previous visits to this website or other websites.

five.title: 5. Third‑party services and links
five.text: The website contains links to external resources. We do not control their content or privacy practices. Please review the policies of the websites you visit.

six.title: 6. Policy updates
six.text: We may update this policy as the project evolves. The current version is always available on this page.

one.title: Official web-site of the President of Uzbekistan
one.pageTitle: Official Website of the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan
one.description: The official website of the President of Uzbekistan, Shavkat Mirziyoyev, provides news, official documents, speeches, and information on both domestic and international events involving the presidency. It includes sections for recent events, presidential decrees, and key strategic initiatives, along with a virtual reception for citizens' inquiries. The site also offers multimedia content, including photos and videos, and covers the President's visits abroad and meetings with international leaders.
intro: The official website of the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan is the main online resource publishing up-to-date information on the activities of the head of state, decisions made and government initiatives. This website serves as the official source of news, decrees, speeches and other materials related to the President's activities.

The site publishes official statements, press releases, information on international meetings and visits, as well as materials on the country's socio-economic development. The resource is intended for citizens, business representatives, journalists and anyone interested in obtaining reliable information on government policy.
Using the official website allows you to receive verified information directly from the primary source without distortion or intermediaries.

two.title: Legislative Chamber of the Oliy Majlis of the Republic of Uzbekistan
two.description: The official website of the Oliy Majlis (Parliament) of Uzbekistan provides detailed information about the legislative process, the structure of the parliament, and its key functions. It features content on both the Legislative Chamber and Senate, along with updates on current and past sessions, laws, and parliamentary initiatives. The site also offers insights into the roles of members, legal reforms, and news releases. Additionally, there is a section for public engagement and queries.

seo.title: Legislative Chamber of the Oliy Majlis of the Republic of Uzbekistan – Structure, Functions, and Activities
seo.description: The Legislative Chamber of the Oliy Majlis of Uzbekistan serves as the lower house of parliament, playing a key role in shaping the country’s political, social, and economic frameworks. Its primary responsibility is to draft and approve legislation that reflects citizens' interests and ensures transparency and efficiency in legislative processes. Members of the chamber develop and review laws, endorse state programs for improving public welfare, and promote Uzbekistan’s international relations. Additionally, the Legislative Chamber monitors law enforcement and regulatory compliance across the republic, striving to strengthen democracy and uphold the rule of law within Uzbekistan.

three.title: Senate of the Oliy Majlis of the Republic of Uzbekistan
three.description: The Senate of the Oliy Majlis of Uzbekistan plays a crucial role in the legislative process. It represents the interests of regional governments and ensures the oversight of laws passed by the Legislative Chamber. The Senate examines constitutional amendments, ratifies international treaties, and approves appointments to key state positions. Members of the Senate are elected from regional councils, contributing to the legislative balance and regional representation.

seo.title: Senate of the Oliy Majlis of the Republic of Uzbekistan – Structure, Functions, and Responsibilities
seo.description: The Senate of the Oliy Majlis of Uzbekistan serves as the upper house of parliament, overseeing legislation, ensuring regional representation, and upholding public order and lawfulness. Senators play a crucial role in reviewing state programs, fostering international cooperation, and supporting social and economic stability. The Senate addresses key issues in the social, economic, and political spheres, evaluates legislative initiatives, and works toward improving citizens' welfare. Additionally, senators help harmonize the political interests of different regions, contributing to Uzbekistan’s overall stability and development.
